articles.title: Ethereum to begin final dress rehearsal today for Shapella upgrade
articles.description: After testing on Goerli, the developers plan to deploy it on the Ethereum mainnet next month, assuming a successful test.

articles.title: MakerDAO looks to limit volatility after USDC troubles pushed some users to DAI
articles.description: The supply of USDC shrank by 5% while the supply of DAI shot up, increasing to 6.3 billion from 5.1 billion since March 10.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Price Growth Lags, Here's What Can Drive Short-Term Growth
articles.description: Cardano price picked up pace after initial lag amid ongoing market upsurge
